creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
I finally found the problem: it seems that CLANG is generating invalid 
code when WITH_CPU is set. I reinstalled mpg123 with portmaster -m 
"WITH_CPU=" and it doesn't core dump anymore

On 08/15/2012 16:37, Roman Bogorodskiy wrote:
> Hi,
>
> I've updated mpg123 to the newest bugfix release: 1.14.4. Could you
> please check if it fixes the problem?
>
> If it doesn't, it makes sense to submit a bug report upstream. Also it
> would be useful to share a media file which could be used to reproduce
> the problem.
>
> Thanks,
>
> Roman Bogorodskiy
